description.value: Price 12,000 gp; Slot neck; CL 3rd; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint enchantment DESCRIPTION These glass amulets hold a bubbling red magical liquid called “ euphorica ” and often feature a religion’s or deity’s holy symbol. EFFECT While worn, the magical liquid within the amulet tinges the user’s healing magic with a wash of ecstasy that acts as a magical drug, making the recipient of the healing more susceptible to mental manipulation by the wearer of the amulet. Anytime the wearer casts a healing spell or uses a spell-like ability on a single target, the recipient of the magical healing additionally must succeed at a DC 13 Fortitude save or become addicted to the wearer’s healing spells. The wearer can suppress this effect by shielding the amulet from view with a hand or held item as a free action. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells cure light wounds, enthrall; Cost 6,000 gp
